records.question: Which players weigh at least 150 and were born exactly on 1986-03-20?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT player.id FROM player
WHERE player.weight >= 150 AND player.birthday = '1986-03-20 00:00:00'
records.pred_sql: SELECT id FROM Player WHERE weight >= 150 AND birthday = '1986-03-20'

records.question: Which players named Marco Estrada born on or after May 28, 1983, are at least 177.8 cm tall and weigh exactly 161 pounds?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT player.id FROM player
WHERE player.height >= 177.8 AND player.weight = 161 AND player.player_name = 'Marco Estrada' AND player.birthday >= '1983-05-28 00:00:00'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT id
FROM Player
WHERE player_name = 'Marco Estrada'
  AND birthday >= '1983-05-28'
  AND height >= 177.8
  AND weight = 161

records.question: What players named Heiko Westermann have an acceleration of at most 67.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT player.id FROM player
JOIN player_attributes ON player.player_api_id = player_attributes.player_api_id AND player.player_fifa_api_id = player_attributes.player_fifa_api_id
WHERE player_attributes.acceleration <= 67.0 AND player.player_name = 'Heiko Westermann'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.id
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE p.player_name = 'Heiko Westermann' AND pa.acceleration <= 67.0

records.pred_sql:

records.question: Who are the players no taller than 167.64 cm with at most 38 aggression, short passing no more than 76, free kick accuracy at most 66, and ball control no higher than 81, but with at least 62 long passing and 43 marking?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT player.id FROM player
JOIN player_attributes ON player.player_api_id = player_attributes.player_api_id AND player.player_fifa_api_id = player_attributes.player_fifa_api_id
WHERE player_attributes.aggression <= 38.0 AND player_attributes.short_passing <= 76.0 AND player_attributes.long_passing >= 62.0 AND player_attributes.free_kick_accuracy <= 66.0 AND player.height <= 167.64 AND player_attributes.marking >= 43.0 AND player_attributes.ball_control <= 81.0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.id
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE p.height <= 167.64
  AND pa.aggression <= 38
  AND pa.short_passing <= 76
  AND pa.free_kick_accuracy <= 66
  AND pa.ball_control <= 81
  AND pa.long_passing >= 62
  AND pa.marking >= 43

records.question: Which players born on 1982-10-07 have sprint speed of at least 79 and marking of at most 83 on 2009-08-30?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT player.id FROM player
JOIN player_attributes ON player.player_api_id = player_attributes.player_api_id AND player.player_fifa_api_id = player_attributes.player_fifa_api_id
WHERE player_attributes.marking <= 83.0 AND player_attributes.date = '2009-08-30 00:00:00' AND player_attributes.sprint_speed >= 79.0 AND player.birthday = '1982-10-07 00:00:00'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.id
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE p.birthday = '1982-10-07'
AND pa.date = '2009-08-30'
AND pa.sprint_speed >= 79
AND pa.marking <= 83
